scripts.dev: set ComSpec=%SystemRoot%\System32\cmd.exe&& set COMSPEC=%SystemRoot%\System32\cmd.exe&& concurrently -n server,admin -c auto "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w admin && npm run build -w app
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w admin && npm run lint -w app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w admin && npm run typecheck -w app
